description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow set within a walled property featuring a spacious driveway, a three-car garage, and lush landscaping with palm trees and flowering shrubs. The main building has a flat roof with a decorative rooftop element and large, floor-to-ceiling windows that provide ample natural light. The backyard includes a swimming pool with a deck area, outdoor seating, and a tennis court surrounded by greenery. The front entrance is marked by a short staircase leading to a covered porch, while the rear of the house opens to the pool and recreational spaces. The property is enclosed by a low wall, offering privacy and a sense of exclusivity. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a pool, tennis court, and lush landscaping within a walled property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, three-car garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and partial view of the pool and tennis court.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, outdoor seating area, and full tennis court with surrounding greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tennis court, pool, and the rear facade of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows and grouped side windows
